'''Bellis IV''', also known as '''Bellis Four''',<ref name="Lost Suns 2">[[The Old Republic — The Lost Suns 2|''The Old Republic — The Lost Suns'' 2]]</ref> was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="MIH">{{WEGCite|story=Makin' It Happen|book=Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters}}</ref> in the [[Bellis system/Legends|Bellis system]] of [[Demetras sector/Legends|Demetras sector]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> Prior to the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], Bellis IV was the sight of a conflict but was ultimately freed, in large part due to the actions of the Jedi [[Ngani Zho]].<ref name="Lost Suns 2">[[The Old Republic — The Lost Suns 2|''The Old Republic — The Lost Suns'' 2]]</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
